title: Splunk
overview: Splunk is one of the leading SIEM solutions in the market that provides the ability to collect, analyze and correlate the network and machine logs

study.overview: Splunk is one of the leading SIEM solutions in the market that provides the ability to collect, analyze and correlate the network and machine logs
study.whySoc: Use this note as an analyst reference: understand the concept, identify the relevant telemetry, pivot through evidence, and document the decision path clearly.
workflow: Identify the user, host, process, network flow, or identity object involved.
Collect the highest-value logs first and preserve timestamps and assumptions.
Pivot through related notes, telemetry sources, and MITRE references.
Document findings, gaps, containment options, and detection improvements.

splunkExamples.code:
index=Omar sourcetype=WinEventLog:Security EventCode=4625 earliest=-5m
| stats count by Account_Name, src_ip
| where count > 5

index=firewall OR index=Omar
| bin _time span=1m
| stats dc(dest_port) as ports by src_ip, _time
| where ports > 20

tips: pick an accurate sourcetype early / it prevents parsing issues later.
